commit.subject: LU-17069 osc: check for invalid import before osc_lru_reserve
commit.message:
LU-17069 osc: check for invalid import before osc_lru_reserve

osc_lru_reserve() should not be called when OSC/import is disable in
configuration.

If the OSC is disables on the client at mount time, the LRU cache is
not initialized for the OSC.
This could lead to the following crash for a write IO:

BUG: unable to handle kernel NULL pointer dereference at (null)
IP:  osc_lru_reserve+0x27/0x170 [osc]
osc_io_write_iter_init+0x86/0x1e0 [osc]
cl_io_iter_init+0x5f/0x120 [obdclass]
lov_io_add_sub.isra.34+0xc3/0x380 [lov]
lov_io_iter_init+0x257/0x720 [lov]
lov_io_rw_iter_init+0x38a/0x520 [lov]
cl_io_iter_init+0x5f/0x120 [obdclass]
cl_io_loop+0x42/0x1c0 [obdclass]
ll_file_io_generic+0x63b/0xc90 [lustre]
ll_file_aio_write+0x289/0x660 [lustre]
ll_file_write+0x100/0x1c0 [lustre]
vfs_write+0xc0/0x1f0
SyS_write+0x7f/0xf0
system_call_fastpath+0x25/0x2a

Signed-off-by: Etienne AUJAMES <eaujames@ddn.com>
Change-Id: I573e340033fd79df3eb18c9e8256b45c66f5e99f
